Candidate Evaluation Report: Senior Data Analyst Position

Name Education Work Experience Notes
Adrienne Kowalski B.S. Statistics, University of Michigan, 2014. M.S. Data Science, Carnegie Mellon University, 2016. Graduated with distinction; thesis focused on Bayesian inference methods for sparse high-dimensional datasets. Senior Data Analyst, Meridian Health Systems (2019 - present): leads a team of four analysts producing weekly operational dashboards and quarterly outcome reports for executive leadership. Previously Data Analyst II, Vantage Analytics Group (2016 - 2019): built ETL pipelines in Python and SQL serving three Fortune 500 client accounts. Strong communication skills noted by panel. Expressed interest in mentoring junior staff. Salary expectation slightly above posted band; may be negotiable.
Marcus Delgado B.A. Economics, UT Austin, 2011. Data Analyst, Pinnacle Retail Solutions (2013 - 2021): primary analyst for inventory forecasting models used across 140 store locations. Reduced overstock costs by an estimated 18% over three years through improved demand-signal modeling. Freelance consultant (2021 - present): serves small-to-mid-size e-commerce clients with custom reporting and A/B test analysis.
Priya Nambiar B.Tech. Computer Science, IIT Bombay, 2013. M.S. Applied Mathematics, Georgia Tech, 2015. Ph.D. (ABD) Computational Statistics, Georgia Tech. Withdrew to pursue industry role in 2017 after completing all coursework and qualifying exams. Referred by current employee Tomas Ferreira. Panel flagged potential culture-fit concern around remote-work flexibility expectations. Recommend follow-up conversation before advancing.
Jordan Whitfield Business Intelligence Developer, Cascadia Energy (2015 - 2022): designed and maintained a suite of 60+ Tableau dashboards consumed by 200+ internal users; managed migration from on-premise data warehouse to Snowflake. Lead Analyst, Novex Financial (2022 - present): owns end-to-end reporting cycle for regulatory filings, coordinating across compliance, engineering, and finance teams. Self-taught; no formal degree. Provided an impressive portfolio of published Tableau Public workbooks and a GitHub repository with dbt models. Panel unanimously agreed credentials are more than sufficient given demonstrated output.
Svetlana Obrekov B.S. Mathematics, Sofia University, 2009. M.S. Operations Research, Penn State, 2012. Quantitative Analyst, Harborview Asset Management (2012 - 2018): built and maintained factor models for equity portfolio construction; authored internal Python library for back-testing still in active use. Senior Analyst, Lyngate Consulting (2018 - 2024): led analytics engagements for clients in pharma, logistics, and public-sector verticals. Currently unaffiliated (since early 2024) following firm acquisition. Available immediately. Open to hybrid schedule. Deep expertise in R and Python; lighter exposure to cloud data platforms but willing to upskill quickly per her own assessment.
Darnell Osei B.S. Information Systems, Howard University, 2020. Junior Data Analyst, Nexbridge Technologies (2020 - 2023): supported senior analysts in data cleaning, visualization, and ad hoc reporting. Data Analyst, Strata Health (2023 - present): independently manages patient-flow analytics for two hospital campuses.
Camille Tran B.S. Biology, UCLA, 2008. M.P.H. Biostatistics, Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health, 2011. Completed additional coursework in machine learning through Coursera and edX (2019 - 2020). Epidemiologist / Data Analyst, Los Angeles County Department of Public Health (2011 - 2020): produced disease surveillance reports and managed outbreak data pipelines. Senior Data Analyst, Helix Genomics (2020 - present): translates clinical trial data into regulatory submission summaries and internal dashboards.
Reuben Glasscock Application was incomplete at submission deadline. Included only a resume cover letter; no resume, portfolio, or references attached. Retained in system per HR policy but not recommended for interview at this time.
Fatima Al-Rashidi B.S. Computer Engineering, American University of Beirut, 2016. M.S. Data Engineering, TU Munich, 2019. Data Engineer / Analyst, Zephyr Cloud (2019 - 2023): built real-time streaming pipelines on Kafka and Spark supporting analytics for a SaaS platform with 1.2 million active users. Analytics Engineer, Stratum Labs (2023 - present): owns dbt transformation layer and collaborates closely with product and science teams on experiment analysis. Strong technical depth on the engineering side. Panel wants to confirm comfort level with stakeholder-facing presentation work before making offer. Request a second-round presentation exercise.
Oliver Hutchins B.A. History, Oxford University, 2005. Postgraduate Diploma in Statistics, London School of Economics, 2007. Research Analyst, British Broadcasting Corporation (2007 - 2012): produced audience and market research summaries for senior editorial leadership. Senior Analyst, GlobalMind Research (2012 - 2020): managed multi-country survey data projects for consumer-goods clients. Director of Insights, Meridian Strategies (2020 - present): oversees a team of six across three time zones delivering quarterly syndicated research products. Relocating from London; work authorization in progress. Timeline estimated at 8 - 12 weeks. Strong candidat. Worth holding if timeline is acceptable to hiring manager.
